question: At what height does OSHA require fall protection in construction?
why: Work at 6 ft or more requires fall protection

question: You should never walk or stand…
choices: Under a suspended load|Beside a barricade|Near the site office
why: If rigging fails, everything under the load is in the strike zone

question: Temporary power on site should run through…
why: GFCIs cut power fast when current leaks to ground

question: A trench 5 feet deep or more requires…
choices: A protective system (sloping, shoring, or shielding)|Nothing if entered briefly|A warning sign only
answer: A protective system (sloping, shoring, or shielding)

question: The PASS method for fire extinguishers is…
choices: Pull, Aim, Squeeze, Sweep|Push And Stand Still|Point At Smoke Source
why: Pull the pin, aim at the base, squeeze, sweep

question: In the hierarchy of controls, PPE is…
choices: The last line of defense|The most effective control|A substitute for training
why: Eliminate hazards first; PPE limits what is left
